title: deer-flow.audit.recommendation.snapshot v1
description: Lifecycle tracking for an auditor recommendation — covers the recommendation from pending through to actioned, dismissed, or expired. Distinct from deer-flow.audit.recommendation.v1 which carries the verdict payload itself: this snapshot tracks what happened after the verdict was delivered. Enables dashboards to show recommendation backlog and time-to-action. Source: /deer-flow/auditor.

audit_id.description: Identifier for the audit run — matches audit_id in deer-flow.audit.recommendation.v1

issue.description: Short description of the issue identified by the auditor

remediation.description: Concrete remediation action taken or proposed — present when status is actioned

target_cycle_id.description: stack-tuner cycle_id this recommendation targets — enables joining with cycle events

created_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when the recommendation was first emitted

acted_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when status transitioned from pending
